channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [IXIGO] ixigo Trains & ConfirmTkt Partner with Swiggy to offer On-Train Food Delivery
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ixigo Trains and ConfirmTkt, India’s leading AI-based train ticketing platforms, have partnered with Swiggy, India’s pioneering on-demand convenience platform, to power its ‘Food on Train’ service. This integration provides a solution to the 'on-the-move' traveler’s hunger issue, enabling passengers to order their preferred meals seamlessly and have them delivered directly to their seats. The service offers an expanded range of meal choices from over 40,000 trusted restaurant partners across 160+ railway stations in India.

  • ixigo Trains and ConfirmTkt partner with Swiggy for on-train food delivery
  • Travellers can order from 40,000+ restaurants across 160+ stations
  • Real-time tracking and berth delivery available
  • Orders can be placed 4 days to 30 minutes before train arrival
  • Swiggy offers 'assured delivery or full refund' for all food on train orders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Le Travenues Technology Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SANSERA] SBI Mutual Fund Reduces Shareholding in Sansera Engineering Ltd by 2%
item.description:
SBI Mutual Fund has decreased its shareholding in Sansera Engineering Ltd by 2%. The fund sold 21,421 shares, representing 0.0344% of the paid-up share capital of the company. The final holding of SBI Mutual Fund, under its various schemes, is now 4.2152% of the paid-up share capital of Sansera Engineering Ltd.

  • SBI Mutual Fund has sold 21,421 shares of Sansera Engineering Ltd.
  • The sale represents 0.0344% of the paid-up share capital of Sansera Engineering Ltd.
  • The final holding of SBI Mutual Fund in Sansera Engineering Ltd is now 4.2152%.
  • The sale was made under various schemes of SBI Mutual Fund.
  • The sale was made on the 2nd of April, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sansera Engineering Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SUVEN] Suven Life Sciences Ltd: No Material Events to Impact Stock Price
item.description:
Suven Life Sciences Ltd has clarified that they have notified all events that come under the purview of Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. They currently do not have any material announcements or events that may affect the price or volume behavior of the scrip. The recent price/volume movement is attributed to market speculation.

  • Suven Life Sciences Ltd has no material announcements or events that may affect the price or volume behavior of the scrip.
  • The recent price/volume movement is attributed to market speculation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUVEN LIFE SCIENCES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MGL] Prudential plc Acquires Shares in Mahanagar Gas Ltd. Worth INR 987,777,780
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Prudential plc, a UK-based company, has acquired shares in Mahanagar Gas Ltd. through its subsidiary companies. The acquisition was made on the 6th of April, 2026, and the total share capital/voting capital of the TC after the said acquisition is INR 987,777,780. The total diluted share/voting capital of the TC after the said acquisition is also INR 987,777,780. This acquisition was made through a market sale. The total shares carrying voting rights acquired by Prudential plc are 728,763.

  • Prudential plc acquires shares in Mahanagar Gas Ltd.
  • Total share capital/voting capital of the TC after the acquisition is INR 987,777,780.
  • Acquisition made through a market sale.
  • Total shares carrying voting rights acquired are 728,763.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mahanagar Gas Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KUMPFIN] Kumbhat Financial Services Ltd: Sanjay Kumbhat Acquires Shares in Compliance with SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Kumbhat Financial Services Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition has been carried out in reliance upon the exemption provided under Regulation 10(1)(a) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, and is a re-arrangement of shareholding within the promoter group. The transaction does not result in any change in control or management of the target company.

  • Acquisition carried out in reliance on SEBI Regulation 10(1)(a)
  • No change in control or management of the target company
  • Purely a re-arrangement of shareholding within the promoter group
  • Submitted within the prescribed timeline as required under Regulation 10(6)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KUMBHAT FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HYUNDAI] Hyundai Motor India to Increase Car Prices by Up to 1% in May 2026
item.description:
Hyundai Motor India Ltd has announced its plan to increase the prices of its cars by up to 1% across the portfolio, effective May 2026. The decision is due to various cost escalations. The exact quantum of increase will vary based on the variants and models. The company has always tried to absorb rising costs to protect customers from price fluctuations. However, the escalating input costs have necessitated passing on a part of this impact through a marginal price revision.

  • Hyundai Motor India to increase car prices by up to 1%
  • Price revision effective from May 2026
  • Increase attributed to various cost escalations
  • Quantum of increase varies based on variants and models
  • Company aims to absorb rising costs, but escalating input costs necessitate a marginal price revision

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hyundai Motor India Ltd | Category: Price Increase

item.title: [VIDYAWIRES] Vidya Wires Ltd Announces 57.5% QoQ Growth in Q4 Sales, 24.4% YoY Growth in FY 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vidya Wires Limited, a manufacturer of winding and conductivity products, has announced its consolidated sales numbers for the fourth quarter and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. The quarter was marked by a historic milestone with the successful commencement of commercial production at its wholly-owned subsidiary, ALCU Industries Private Limited. The sales numbers for Q4 FY 2026 stood at ₹ 5,979.29 million, showing a significant growth of 57.5% on a quarter-on-quarter basis. The full financial year saw sales of ₹ 18,347.43 million, representing a 24.4% year-on-year growth compared to FY 2025. Please note that the Q4 FY 2026 and FY 2026 sales numbers are provisional and subject to review by the Company's Statutory Auditor.

  • Vidya Wires Limited announces Q4 and FY 2025-26 sales numbers
  • 57.5% QoQ growth in Q4 sales
  • 24.4% YoY growth in FY 2026 sales
  • Historic milestone with commercial production at ALCU Industries Private Limited
  • Provisional sales numbers subject to review by Statutory Auditor

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vidya Wires Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ASHIANA] Ashiana Housing Ltd. Confirms Non-Applicability Under SEBI Circular for Fund Raising by Large Entities
item.description:
Ashiana Housing Ltd. has announced that it does not fall under the category defined in the SEBI circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613, regarding fund raising by issuance of debt securities by Large Corporates. The company's secretary and compliance officer, Nitin Sharma, have informed the BSE Ltd. and National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. about this non-applicability on 13th April 2022.

  • Ashiana Housing Ltd. does not fall under the category defined in the SEBI circular SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613
  • Nitin Sharma, the company's secretary and compliance officer, informed the BSE Ltd. and National Stock Exchange of India Ltd.
  • The confirmation comes as an update on the 13th of April, 2022

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASHIANA HOUSING LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus Lifesciences Receives USFDA Approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets, Eyeing USD 10.2bn Market
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zydus Lifesciences Ltd has received final approval from the USFDA for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg, a sodium-glucose cotransporter 2 (SGLT2) inhibitor indicated for type 2 diabetes mellitus. The approval grants Zydus 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity. The tablets will be manufactured at the group’s formulation manufacturing facility at SEZ, Ahmedabad. Dapagliflozin tablets had annual sales of USD 10.2bn in the United States (IQVIA MAT February 2026). Zydus now has 436 approvals and has filed 505 ANDAs since the commencement of the filing process in FY 2003-04.

  • Zydus Lifesciences receives USFDA approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg
  • Approval grants Zydus 180 days of shared generic drug exclusivity
  • Dapagliflozin tablets had annual sales of USD 10.2bn in the United States
  • Zydus now has 436 approvals
  • 505 ANDAs have been filed by Zydus since FY 2003-04

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: USFDA

item.title: [TVSMOTOR] TVS Motor Launches Armado 200 in Indonesia for Tough Terrain
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TVS Motor Company has launched the TVS Armado 200, a new three-wheeler designed for Indonesia's commercial and logistics industries. The vehicle is powered by a 197.75 cc engine and has a 2-meter cargo bed with a payload capacity of up to 840 kg. It is available in three colors and is offered at an introductory price of IDR 34,900,000 (OTR Jakarta). The TVS Armado 200 is a locally developed product, reflecting TVS Motor’s commitment to local engineering excellence and long-term investment in this segment.

  • Powered by a robust 197.75 cc oil-cooled engine for high durability and exceptional pick-up
  • Designed with a 2-meter cargo bed and a best-in-class payload capacity of up to 840 kg
  • Offered at an introductory price of IDR 34,900,000 (OTR Jakarta)
  • Reflects TVS Motor’s commitment to local engineering excellence and long-term investment in Indonesia
  • Features leaf-spring suspension with dampers, ergonomic seating, and a padded backrest for all-terrain comfort

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TVS MOTOR COMPANY LTD. | Category: New Launch
